query:

  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS base_mp INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 200,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS gold_drop INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS minion_ids JSON,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS resist_wood INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS resist_fire INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS resist_earth INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS resist_metal INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS resist_water INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0;
